name: Almond Flour Banana Bread with Collagen
ingredients:
3 very ripe bananas, mashed
3 eggs
2 tbsp sugar
2 cups almond flour
1 tsp baking soda
1/4 tsp salt
1 tsp vanilla extract
1/2 tsp cinnamon
1 scoop collagen powder
1/3 cup chopped dark chocolate, optional
directions:
1. Preheat & prep: Preheat oven to 350F. Leave clay dish at room temperature — do not preheat it. Grease generously with butter or coconut oil.
2. Mash bananas: Mash 3 very ripe bananas thoroughly until smooth.
3. Mix wet ingredients: Whisk in eggs, sugar, and vanilla extract.
4. Add dry ingredients: Stir in almond flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, and collagen powder until just combined. Batter will be thick.
5. Fold in chocolate: Fold in dark chocolate if using.
6. Bake: Pour into clay dish. Check at 45 minutes. Tent with foil if top browns fast. Done when toothpick comes out mostly clean.
7. Cool fully: Cool completely in the dish before slicing — at least 45 minutes.
notes:
Very ripe bananas: The blacker the better — sweeter and more flavorful, so you may not need the full 2 tbsp sugar. Taste the batter and decide.

Clay dish: Don't preheat it, grease well, and check at 45 min.

Storage: Refrigerate up to 5 days. Slices best cold.
